ALPHA — vector store is unencrypted. V0.2 fixes this.

Memory Vault — Phase 3 boot

vault-tauri Phase 3 dev-mode boot smoke. UI implementation lands at Phase 4 (memory CRUD views + ADR-010 banner controls).

Currently exercising:

  • Tauri 2.11.0 main-runtime boot (this page renders → boot succeeded)
  • libonnxruntime path resolution via app.path().resolve(BaseDirectory::Resource)
  • ADR-020 integrity-fatal-dialog wiring (mock-tested in src/lib.rs::tests)
  • ADR-032 SQLCipher key sourced from VAULT_KEY env var
